"C:\Program Files\JetBrains\CLion 2026.1.3\bin\cmake\win\x64\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\z2.dir/objects.a
C:\PROGRA~1\JETBRA~1\CLION2~1.3\bin\mingw\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\z2.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\z2.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\PROGRA~1\JETBRA~1\CLION2~1.3\bin\mingw\bin\gcc.exe  -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\z2.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o z2.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libz2.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\z2.dir\linkLibs.rsp
